  • ECUs

UCT E84 SERIE 3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74B
Recv ID: 76B
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 1C
Func Name: Pilotage capote

    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "330",

  {
    "minbytes": 8,
    "replybytes": "6101",
    "sentbytes": "2101",
    "name": "ReadDataByLocalIdentifier: digital inputs",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Button Close Roof (logic)": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Button Lower Windows": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Button Open Roof (logic)": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Button Rise Windows": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Halls. Roof Open (logic)": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Halls. Trunklid Open (logic)": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Roof Locked": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Roof Ready To Bolt": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Servitude": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Status Driver Hydr. Pump": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Status Driver Magn. Valves": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Status Magn. Valve 1": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Status Magn. Valve 2": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Status Rel. Trunklid Left": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Status Rel. Trunklid Right": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Status Rollbar": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Status Rollbar ECU": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Status Rollo": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Status Watchdog EN": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Trunkl. Left Locked": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Trunkl. Right Locked": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "610E",

      }

  },
  {
    "minbytes": 19,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "Overheat Magn. Valves": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "Roof Position": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Roof Position 1": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Roof Position 2": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "Status Handbrake": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Trunklid State": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Veh. Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 31,
    "replybytes": "6182",
    "manualsend": true,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 8
      },

        "firstbyte": 9
      },

        "firstbyte": 7
      },

        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Producer Absent: UCT": {
        "firstbyte": 31
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "replybytes": "610F",
    "sentbytes": "210F",
    "name": "ReadDataByLocalIdentifier: Last Error",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Precond 1: HS driver magnetic valves OK": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Precond 1: Operating voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Precond 1: Runtime StopMode OK": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Precond 1: Valve 1 OK": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Precond 1: Valve 2 OK": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Precond 2: HS driver hydraulic pump OK": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Precond 2: Relais 1 OK": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Precond 2: Relais 2 OK": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Precond 2: Servitude ON": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Precond 3: Hall sensors OK": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Precond 3: No roof timeout": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Precond 3: Position switches OK": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Precond 3: Rollbar retracted": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Precond 3: Roof in known position": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Precond 3: Trunklid closed": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Precond 3: Vehicle speed <3km/h": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Precond 4: Rollo closed": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Precond 4: Runtime Hydraulic Pump OK": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  },

        "firstbyte": 9

      "Timeout Open Trunklid 1 (close roof)": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Timeout Unlock Trunklid 1 (close roof)": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Timeout Unlock Trunklid 2 (close roof)": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {

    "deny_sds": [
